Quality Education.reason: The course is fundamentally about teacher training, focusing on bilingual teaching skills and practice, directly supporting Target 4.c (increase the supply of qualified teachers).
evidence: 具備教學實務經驗與技能

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course provides vocational skills for future employment as teachers, linking to Target 8.5 (productive employment) by equipping students with 'practical teaching experiences and skills'.

Possess practical teaching experiences and skills

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Inferred link as bilingual education can promote social inclusion (Target 10.2) by improving educational access and outcomes, though not an explicit course goal.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course promotes collaboration through 'teacher cooperation and division of labor' and 'Bilingual teachers come to the class to share', reflecting the partnership spirit of Target 17.17.
